title: Contributor Code of Conduct
text: contributors maintainers project, pledge respect people contribute reporting issues, posting feature requests, updating documentation, submitting pull requests patches, activities. committed making participation project harassment-free experience everyone, regardless level experience, gender, gender identity expression, sexual orientation, disability, personal appearance, body size, race, ethnicity, age, religion. Examples unacceptable behaviour participants include use sexual language imagery, derogatory comments personal attacks, trolling, public private harassment, insults, unprofessional conduct. Project maintainers right responsibility remove, edit, reject comments, commits, code, wiki edits, issues, contributions aligned Code Conduct. Project maintainers follow Code Conduct may removed project team. Instances abusive, harassing, otherwise unacceptable behaviour may reported opening issue contacting one project maintainers. Code Conduct adapted Contributor Covenant (http://contributor-covenant.org), version 1.0.0, available http://contributor-covenant.org/version/1/0/0/

Version 0.0.5},   author = {Thierry Onkelinx},   year = {2026},   url = {https://inbo.github.io/flandersqmd/},   abstract = {Prepare new documents using the Flandersqmd extensions.},   keywords = {corporate identity; quarto; inbo_version}, }

what: Auxiliary Function for the Flandersqmd Quarto Extensions
title: Auxiliary Function for the Flandersqmd Quarto Extensions
text: Onkelinx, Thierry123 Research Institute Nature Forest (INBO)45 keywords: corporate identity; quarto Prepare new documents using Flandersqmd extensions.

title: Auxiliary Function for the Flandersqmd Quarto Extensions
text: can install development version GitHub : stable version available r-universe:

what: Working on a book style report
title: Auxiliary Function for the Flandersqmd Quarto Extensions
text: book style report provides structure write report book style format. based quarto book format uses flandersqmd-book extension. available output formats pdf html. Though optional, strongly recommend create checklist project first. information create checklist project, see checklist package documentation. generate skeleton report using create_report(). function guide interactively process setting report. setup completed report automatically rendered html pdf format. respective output files located output folder report folder. function also create RStudio project file report folder. run function RStudio, project opened automatically new session. starting new report, often don’t metadata available yet. Run insert_missing_metadata() add required metadata report becomes available . E.g. report number, DOI, … flandersqmd create cover page. provide cover page . Use add_cover() add cover page report render report include cover page. Note can render draft version report without cover page missing metadata.
code: library(checklist) # Where to store the checklist project path <- tempfile() dir.create(path) # create the checklist project create_project(path = path, project = "flandersqmd-book") # Create a report skeleton library(flandersqmd) create_report(file.path(path, "flandersqmd-book"), reportname = "myreport") insert_missing_metadata(file.path(path, "flandersqmd-book", "myreport")) add_cover(   report_path = file.path(path, "flandersqmd-book", "myreport"),   cover_pdf = "path/to/cover.pdf" ) # Render the report quarto::quarto_render(file.path(path, "flandersqmd-book", "myreport"))

title: Auxiliary Function for the Flandersqmd Quarto Extensions
text: package contains slides workshop. Run code render view slides.
code: workshop_path <- tempfile("flandersqmd_workshop") dir.create(workshop_path) system.file("workshop", package = "flandersqmd") |>   file.copy(workshop_path, recursive = TRUE) oldwd <- getwd() file.path(workshop_path, "workshop") |>   setwd() quarto::quarto_add_extension("inbo/flandersqmd-revealjs", no_prompt = TRUE) quarto::quarto_render(as_job = FALSE) setwd(oldwd) file.path(workshop_path, "output", "index.html") |>   browseURL()

text: path folder create folder containing report. Defaults current working directory. also creates RStudio project file report folder. ran RStudio, project opened automatically new session. reportname folder name report. location folder reportname depends content path. path checklist::checklist project, find new report path/source/reportname. path checklist::checklist package, find new report path/inst/reportname. Otherwise find new report path/reportname. version version flandersqmd-book extension use. Defaults "main", refers current version. shortname Deprecated. Use reportname instead.
